targetPlan.finalGoal: Use production Field Evidence Kit signals to prove a target-specific GA release decision for a GitHub-connected project.
phaseGoals: target-readiness: confirm field-evidence-ga-demo-1783063695244 target plan and acceptance criteria
evidence-matrix: collect required release criteria and scenario evidence
remediation-loop: route failed criteria to EvoPilot remediation and verification
release-decision: produce GO, CONDITIONAL-GO, NO-GO, or BLOCKED with audit evidence
acceptanceCriteria: requiredScenarios pass: field-evidence-project-onboarding, field-evidence-discovery-target, field-evidence-target-loop, field-evidence-release-decision
mock, fake, stub, simulator, fixture-only, demo-only, smoke-only, or chat-only evidence is not accepted as release evidence

targetPlanConfirmation.instruction: ProofOps target plan confirmed through EvoPilot target-loop approval gate.

evidenceMatrix.nextRepairAction: Run the target loop and collect real release evidence.
